items.name: moving-border
items.title: Moving Border
items.description: SVG-path-tracing animated border that orbits a button or card.

items.name: typewriter-text
items.title: Typewriter Text
items.description: Character-by-character typing with blinking cursor, configurable speed, and delete-retype loop.

items.name: 3d-tilt-card
items.title: 3D Tilt Card
items.description: Perspective-shifting card that tilts toward the cursor with parallax layers and glare overlay.

items.name: spotlight-card
items.title: Spotlight Card
items.description: Card with a radial spotlight that follows the mouse cursor across its surface.

items.name: aurora-background
items.title: Aurora Background
items.description: A fully customizable, smooth aurora light background mimicking the northern lights. Configurable via exact hex props alongside automatic integration with the current light or dark mode theme. Accessibility: Respects prefers-reduced-motion (drifting pauses smoothly).

items.name: animated-tabs
items.title: Animated Tabs
items.description: Tab bar with a sliding pill that morphs between active tabs using layout animation.

items.name: magnetic-button
items.title: Magnetic Button
items.description: Button that stretches toward the cursor when nearby and snaps back with spring physics.

items.name: infinite-marquee
items.title: Infinite Marquee
items.description: Seamless infinite-scrolling ticker with pause-on-hover and variable speed.

items.name: scroll-reveal
items.title: Scroll Reveal
items.description: Elements animate into view when they enter the viewport, with 6 animation presets.

items.name: skeleton-shimmer
items.title: Skeleton Shimmer
items.description: Skeleton loading placeholders with animated shimmer gradient sweep and pulse fade.

items.name: morphing-modal
items.title: Morphing Modal
items.description: Modal that expands from the trigger element with spring physics and backdrop blur.

items.name: animated-glowing-text-outline
items.title: Animated Glowing Text
items.description: Animated SVG drawing trace outline over shimmering text characters.

items.name: gradient-text-reveal
items.title: Gradient Text Reveal
items.description: Word-by-word text reveal with gradient coloring and blur-to-clear spring animation.

items.name: scramble-text
items.title: Scramble Text
items.description: Matrix-style text scramble effect that resolves characters left-to-right.

items.name: meteors-card
items.title: Meteors Card
items.description: Card with animated meteor/shooting star particles falling through the background.

items.name: flip-card
items.title: Flip Card
items.description: 3D card flip with spring physics, supporting hover or click triggers.

items.name: dot-grid-background
items.title: Dot Grid Background
items.description: Interactive dot-grid pattern with a glowing cursor-following effect.

items.name: floating-dock
items.title: Floating Dock
items.description: macOS-style dock with magnetic scaling, spring physics, and tooltips.

items.name: confetti-burst
items.title: Confetti Burst
items.description: Click-triggered confetti particle explosion with customizable colors and physics.

items.name: drawer-slide
items.title: Drawer Slide
items.description: Slide-out drawer panel with drag-to-dismiss, spring physics, and backdrop blur.

items.name: notification-stack
items.title: Notification Stack
items.description: Stacked toast notifications with auto-dismiss progress, sliding animations, and multiple types.

items.name: animated-timeline
items.title: Animated Timeline
items.description: Scroll-triggered timeline with 4 distinct Motion.dev animation variants: vertical spring, horizontal growing line, alternating cards, and numbered steps.

items.name: nested-comments
items.title: Nested Comments
items.description: Threaded comment section with infinite nesting, animated expand/collapse, inline reply composer, and spring-physics like button.

items.name: hover-reveal-card
items.title: Hover Reveal Card
items.description: Card that displays an image with teaser content, then slides up a full details panel on hover with staggered Motion.dev animations.

items.name: bento-grid
items.title: Bento Grid
items.description: Responsive masonry-style grid with staggered scroll-reveal, pointer-follow spotlight, hover lift and shadows, optional spin borders, and spring micro-interactions per cell.

items.name: horizontal-scroll-gallery
items.title: Horizontal Scroll Gallery
items.description: Converts vertical scroll into horizontal movement with momentum physics for immersive galleries.

items.name: particle-field
items.title: Particle Field
items.description: Canvas-based floating particles with mouse-repulsion physics and responsive connecting lines.

items.name: interactive-cursor
items.title: Interactive Cursor
items.description: Spring-smoothed cursor overlay with magnetic hover states, click ripples, optional particles, and support for full-page or container-scoped interactions.

items.name: radial-menu
items.title: Radial Menu
items.description: Circular flyout menu that bursts items outward from a center trigger with staggered spring animation.

items.name: cursor-trail
items.title: Cursor Trail
items.description: Glowing trail that follows the cursor with decay physics, like a sparkler or comet tail.

items.name: pen-cursor
items.title: Pen Cursor
items.description: Physics-driven ribbon trail rendered on canvas — a chain of linked points follows the mouse with spring-damping inertia, width scales with speed, and colors interpolate head-to-tail. Inspired by obsidianassembly.com.

items.name: glow-hero-section
items.title: Glow Hero Section
items.description: Physics-driven hero section with an interactive aqueous mesh canvas, spring-based motion text entrance, and fully configurable badge, heading, description, colors, and dimensions.

items.name: morphing-card-stack
items.title: Morphing Card Stack
items.description: An interactive collection of cards that smoothly layout-morphs between Stack, Grid, and List configurations using Framer Motion springs.

items.name: limelight-nav
items.title: Limelight Nav
items.description: Adaptive fluid navigation bar with a limelight spotlight and spring-animated tabs.

items.name: data-table
items.title: Data Table
items.description: Configurable data table with optional column freeze (left/right), customizable header and body colors and backgrounds, optional borders, and optional sortable columns.

items.name: multi-step-auth-card
items.title: Multi-Step Auth Card
items.description: Animation-first enterprise auth flow: email discovery, first-time and returning user paths, password create/login, and OTP verification with spring transitions between steps.

items.name: shiny-text
items.title: Shiny Text
items.description: A shimmering highlight that continuously sweeps across text — perfect for hero taglines and call-to-action copy.

items.name: blur-reveal
items.title: Blur Reveal
items.description: Characters or words materialise from a soft blur — the cinematic text entrance used in top SaaS hero sections.

items.name: count-up
items.title: Count Up
items.description: An animated number that counts from a starting value to a target when scrolled into view — essential for metrics and stats sections.

items.name: border-beam
items.title: Border Beam
items.description: A glowing comet that continuously orbits the border of a container — instantly upgrades cards, code blocks, and feature sections.

items.name: ripple
items.title: Ripple
items.description: Luminous orbs that drift slowly across the viewport — a liquid nebula hero background with warm, organic colour blooms.

items.name: word-rotate
items.title: Word Rotate
items.description: A list of words that cycle with slide, flip, or fade transitions — the signature hero-headline effect used across modern SaaS sites.

items.name: shooting-stars-grid
items.title: ShootingStarsGrid
items.description: A cinematic hero-section background: a faint grid bathed in dark-emerald glow, with thin white streaks that race along grid lanes like falling stars. Built on Motion.dev with compositor-only transforms for smooth 60fps.

items.name: dynamic-info
items.title: DynamicInfo
items.description: An interactive profile pill that shows avatar, name, role, and a live ticking clock. Click to reveal social links and a status indicator. Drop-in floatable via the position prop.
